summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Optimized timing results CSV exists with expected columns and contains benchmark data for all required scales (10MB, 100MB, 1GB, 10GB). The 10GB scale correctly shows only crossbasis stage for C1 (as GLM exceeds memory). C2 1GB crossbasis shows 5.66x speedup (7.4s optimized vs 41.9s baseline), far exceeding the 2x requirement.
